'''Rancor Ribs''' were a rare [[Foodstuff/Legends|delicacy]] made from the cooked [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]] [[Rib/Legends|ribs]] covered in a [[Color/Legends|reddish]] sauce, which were sold at the dining establishment, [[RIB hutt]], who proudly displayed the slogan "Home of the 'Rancor Ribs'" outside of their storefront.<ref name="Lollipop" />

{{Stub}}
